programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Looking at Judas Iscariot's betrayal of Jesus and the significance of the language he used.

programme.title: You'll Get Through This
programme.sub-title: Oh, So This Is Boot Camp
programme.desc: Max Lucado discusses trusting God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Stay Seated in God's Supernatural Rest
programme.desc: Remaining peaceful even when life gets difficult.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Seven Churches of Revelation: Losing Your First Love
programme.desc: In a letter to the church in Ephesus, Paul describes what occurs when a body of believers loses its first love and then recognizes the importance of repenting and returning to its initial devotion to Christ.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C.; pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: The Mark Trammell Quartet; Signature Sound and the LeFevres; host Jason Crabb and The Isaacs on the Red Carpet.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.desc: A central theme in the life and times of Jesus, the Sea of Galilee is a living legacy of history, harmony and support.

programme.title: Signs & Secrets of the Messiah with Rabbi Jason Sobel
programme.sub-title: The Signs and Secrets of Transformation (Part 1)
programme.desc: Rabbi Jason talks about Yeshua turning water into wine at a wedding celebration, why he chose this event for his first public miracle and how this sign connects to old testament prophecy.

programme.title: Praise
programme.sub-title: Sheila Walsh, Lee Strobel -- Is God Real?
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh talks with Lee Strobel, a former atheist turned Christian; they discuss Lee's book, "Is God Real? Exploring the Ultimate Question of Life."

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Seven Churches of Revelation: The Suffering Church
programme.desc: The faithful church in Smyrna shows that it is possible to endure persecution for the sake of Christ.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Your Thoughts Shape Your Health
programme.desc: Did you know your thoughts affect both your body and your emotions? Discover how renewing your mind can bring better health, emotional balance and strength for everyday life.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.sub-title: Green Light at the Red Sea
programme.desc: How to persevere in the face of resistance and keep moving forward into purpose.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Jesus' Heart for Your Health and Wholeness
programme.desc: Don't settle for half the gift: Joseph says Jesus paid for your salvation as well as healing at the cross!

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist, pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the first Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: Stephen McWhirter, the singer and author of "Radically Restored," shares his rough road to Jesus and the inspiration behind his song "Come Jesus Come."

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.
